articles.title: 3 days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: Three days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to Disrupt 2026. Buy one TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket, and get a second ticket at 50% off. Gain more visibility in the tech industry. Offer ends May 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT.
articles.summary: The TechCrunch Disrupt event offers a second ticket deal where purchasing one gives access to an additional half-price ticket. This promotion is valid until May 8 at night.
points: Discounted tickets available for purchase
Offer expires on May 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT.
Increased visibility in the tech industry.
articles.insight: This news emphasizes a unique opportunity to attend TechCrunch Disrupt and gain exposure within the IT/technology sector, with significant savings available for attendees through this promotional offer. The limited timeframe until May 8 adds an element of urgency that may encourage tech professionals or enthusiasts looking to network.

articles.title: AI boom pushes Samsung to $1T
articles.description: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.
articles.summary: Samsung's share value has skyrocketed due to an AI-driven chip demand boom, propelling its worth beyond $1 trillion and marking it as the second Asian company after TSMC with such a valuation.
points: Share price surge: Samsung shares have increased significantly amidst growing demand for AI-driven chips in various industries, particularly technology firms that rely on advanced chip capabilities to develop and improve their products. The rise in share value reflects investor confidence in the company's ability to capitalize on this trend.

Valuation milestone: Samsung has become only the second Asian tech giant after TSMC to reach a $1 trillion valuation, highlighting its dominant position within both South Korea and Asia as a whole. This achievement is seen as indicative of robust future growth potential for the company.

Implications for AI research: As companies increasingly seek out advanced chip technology with embedded artificial intelligence capabilities to stay ahead in their industries – particularly gaming, robotics, automotive and more - Samsung's success underscores a broader trend of growing demand within the tech industry.
articles.insight: This AI-driven chip boom signifies increased investor confidence in South Korea’s technology sector as well as an accelerating growth trajectory for companies like Samsung. This development, coupled with competition from TSMC and other global competitors, indicates a potential reconfiguration of the semiconductor industry landscape.

articles.title: Some kids are bypassing age verification checks with a fake mustache
articles.description: A new survey found that kids find it easy to bypass age checks, despite a rise in age verification laws around the world.
articles.summary: The article discusses how children are successfully evading age check systems using fake mustaches.
points: Children find it easy to bypass age checks with deception
Age verification laws have risen globally, yet success continues for minors in faking appearance-based IDs
The effectiveness of current physical biometric measures is questioned
articles.insight: This finding indicates a significant loophole within the age gate mechanisms that need urgent addressing to prevent access to restricted content, as well as raising concerns about alternative methods' reliability.

articles.title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure tablet goes back to basics with a monochrome screen
articles.description: The new Paper Pure is lighter and faster than the reMarkable 2, which is going to be retired six years since its launch.
articles.summary: ReMarkable has launched a simplified version of their original tablet concept called Paper Pure. The device boasts an improved screen and is designed to prioritize the user experience with its lighter weight and speedy processing.
points: The reMarkable Paper Pure uses a monochrome screen that has been optimized for better visual clarity, especially in outdoor lighting conditions.
This latest model offers significant improvements over previous versions with faster performance without compromising the simplicity and tactile feel of writing on paper-like surfaces.
With its focus on traditional note-taking methods replicated digitally, reMarkable continues to cater to professionals in fields such as education and design.
articles.insight: The launch of Paper Pure demonstrates ReMarkable's commitment to refining the tablet concept for enhanced user experience. The monochrome screen innovation may influence future educational tools that require clear visibility under various lighting conditions, potentially benefiting learning environments.

articles.title: [K-시큐리티 글로벌 도약 - 뭉쳐야산다] ③외산에 안밀리려면 외산 손잡아야... ‘연동’ 나선다
articles.description: 글로벌 플랫폼과 연동해 잠재 고객 확보 및 기술 시너지적극 나서는 CTI 기업들... 정부도 연동 중요성 강조[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 국내 보안 기업들의 글로벌 경쟁력 강화를 위한 전략으로 기업간 ‘협업’이 중요해지는 가운데, 해외 시장을 겨냥해 글로벌 플랫폼과의 연동에 박차를 가하는 기업들이 눈길을 끈다. 최근 공격표면관리(ASM), 위협 인텔리전스(CT
articles.summary: Korea'dee Tech Industry Embraces Globalization with Strategic Alliances
points: - K-시큐리티기업이 글로벌 경쟈에서의 협상을 강조한다.
- 한야인 '외산'과 '손잡아'이 공동임성을 강하게 보여준다.
- 국내 기술 시멘트리를 병합하는 전략의 중요성을 강조한다.
articles.insight: Korea's IT/tech industry is actively seeking global partnerships to bolster its competitiveness in the international stage. By forming strategic alliances, Korean companies aim not only to expand their customer base globally but also to enhance technological security against emerging threats.

articles.title: 피넛AI/옵시아, IAEA CyberCon 2026서 논문 발표 및 CTF 운영
articles.description: 원자력 보안 분야 권위 행사... 한국 민간 보안 기술 존재감 각인[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 원자력 및 산업 제어 시스템(OT/ICS) 보안 전문 기업 피넛AI/옵시아(OPCIA)가 5월 오스트리아 빈에서 개최되는 ‘제2회 국제 원자력 사이버보안 컨퍼런스’(IAEA CyberCon 2026)에 참가해 논문 4편 발표와 실전형 CTF 운영을 동시에 수행한다.이
articles.summary: 피넛AI가 IAEA CyberCon 2026에서 논문 발표 및 CTF 운영을 중지한 결과, IT/기술 관련 업체의 중요성과 잘못된 해외 인식이 보고많다.
points: 피넛AI가 IAEC CyberCon에서 논문을 발표하여 CTF를 실행
그의 중단은 IT/기술 산업에 대한 인식이 잘못되었다는 것을 의미한다.
피넛AI의 중단은 이전 내용보다 일부 사고와 위기적인 잡음에 대한 해방제시도였다.
articles.insight: 피넛AI의 중단은 IT/기술 업체에게 중요한 인식을 강조한다.그리고 피넛AI의 일부 사고와 위기적인 잡음에 대해서는 자세함으로썰진다.

articles.title: [보안 습관 테스트] ① 재택 및 카페에서의 업무, 당신의 자료는 안전한가요?
articles.description: 공공장소에서의 와이파이 이용은 주의 필요보안은 작은 습관의 실천부터 시작[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 재택근무와 유연 근무제가 확산하면서 집이나 카페에서 업무를 보는 경우가 많아졌다. 하지만 편리함 뒤에는 보안 위험이 숨어 있기 마련이다. 특히 공용 와이파이를 사용할 때는 회사 자료가 해킹이나 데이터 유출 위험에 노출될 수 있지만, 많은 사람이 이를 간과하거나
articles.summary: 공공장소에서의 와이파이 사용 안전성에 대한 보안 주의가 필요해지며, 회사 자원이 공유나 분석에서 위험적 활동이 일어나는 문제가 있다.
points: 공공장소에서 재택근무와 유연근무가 공용 와이파이를 사용하여 직업을 수행한다.
회사 자원의 보안 위험이 더위로 묘사되어 간첩되지만, 공식적으로 보호 방안을 도입하여 해결할 수 없다.
이용자들이 제출하기 시작한 데이터가 공유나 회사에서의 컴퓨팅 모드로 계정을 재구성하여 보호하는 대가가 존재한다.
articles.insight: 공동 움직임을 이용하면서도 보안에 해킹이나 유출을 방지하기 위해 울정되어야 한다.

articles.title: [Global Security TOP 100] 윤우희 에스케어 대표 “탐지·대응 넘어 ‘제로 공격 표면’ 선도”

articles.title: 헝가리 미디어 기업 ‘미디어웍스’ 8.5TB 정보 유출... 공격 배후는 ‘월드리크스’
articles.description: 기업 내부 기밀 데이터 무방비 유출되며 보안 취약점 노출우크라이나 비방 목적의 편집 지침 공개로 신뢰도 추락 위기[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 헝가리 대형 미디어 기업 미디어웍스(Mediaworks)가 랜섬웨어 조직의 공격을 받아 8.5테라바이트(TB) 규모의 내부 기밀 데이터가 유출된 것으로 파악됐다. 이번 공격 배후인 월드리크스(World Leaks)는 탈취
articles.summary: 미디어웍스가 8.5TB의 규모로 내부 정보를 유출받는 공격으로, '월드리크스'이 지침을 공개한다.
points: 미디어웍스에서 8.5TB의 내부 정보가 무방비로 활용되고, 전세도 광벡터인 '월드리크스'이 발결한 지침.
공격에 의해 내부정보 사용은 방화국가 안전도시에서 광별자동차로 진행되어 있다.
이러한 공격에 대비할 수 있는 추가적인 보안 개정으로 전문가의 지원이 요인.
articles.insight: 이러한 업무적 위기는 미디어웍스의 관리 정보 공개 지침에 대한 IT/비방적 질서 강화를 의미한다.

articles.title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
articles.description: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.
articles.summary: Peter Sarlin’deQuTwoAI lab has raised €25 million in angel funding round valuing the company at approximately $380 million.
points: Finnish AI firm QyTw0, founded by former Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, reached a significant valuation after raising funds.
The €25 million angel round highlights the robust demand for European-founded tech companies focused on AI and quantum computing.
QuTwo's success reflects strong tailwinds in these technology sectors.
articles.insight: This funding achievement suggests sustained investor confidence in Europe’s role within the expanding markets of AI, quantum computing, and other tech areas that emphasize sovereignty or national advantages.

articles.title: 이지서티, 맥락 읽는 AI 개인정보보호 솔루션 ‘EZRO’ 시리즈 런칭
articles.description: TTA의 엄격한 품질 심사 통과하며 인공지능(AI) 보안 기술 완성도 입증NH농협손해보험 납품 계약 동시 성사시키며 하반기 금융권 시장 공략 박차[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 이지서티가 AI 기반 개인정보보호 솔루션 ‘이지로’(EZRO) 시리즈를 공식 런칭하고, 첫 제품인 ‘EZRO-PSM V4.0’을 출시했다고 6일 밝혔다. EZRO는 AI 기반으로 개인정보보
articles.summary: 이지서티는 AI 기반 개인정보보호 솔루션 'EZRO'을 시리즈로 량체한계하여 량판 공장에서 출시할 준비가 다음과 같다.
points: 이지서티는 AI를 통해 개인정보의 안전성을 강제로 유지하기 위해 'EZRO-PSM V4.0'으로 시리즈
- 이 시리즈는 모든 고객에서 개인정보보호를 최대한 확보합니다.
- TTA가 'EZRO'의 품질을 강제로 평가하면서 공랩을 시도한 것이 반드시 그 전에 이 기업은 'EZRO'를 시리즈으로 량체한계하여 공급합니다.
articles.insight: 이지서티의 이어들기는 IT/기술 업계에서 AI보안 기술의 현명한 전략이며, 'EZRO'의 시리즈으로 공급하면 고객들의 개인정보보호를 확보하는 이해를 가능に 만들 것입니다.

articles.title: 카카오-경찰청, 피싱 범죄 대응 맞손
articles.description: ‘피싱 범죄 피해예방 및 근절을 위한 업무협약’ 체결경찰청 최신 범행 데이터 활용... 운영정책 및 이용자 보호 프로세스 고도화, 범행 계정 신속 제한[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 카카오(대표 정신아)는 경찰청(청장 직무대행 유재성)과 6일 경찰청 통합대응단 회의실에서 ‘피싱 범죄 피해예방 및 근절을 위한 업무협약’을 체결했다고 밝혔다. 협약식엔 조석영 카카오

articles.insight: 이러한 IT/기술 활용은 카카오이사이크가 보호를 강화하고, 근절과 범죄에 대해 최저로 보다 효율적으로 대응할 수 0ne.

articles.title: [디지털 문단속] #2. 길고 복잡할수록 좋아, 공유기 비밀번호 설정법
articles.description: 영문과 숫자 조합한 10자리 이상 비밀번호로 무차별 대입 공격 원천 차단[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 우리의 일상을 편리하게 만들어주는 사물인터넷(IoT) 기기가 내 사생활을 훔쳐보는 눈과 귀로 변할 수도 있다. 거실의 스마트 TV부터 로봇청소기, 홈캠 등 집안의 모든 기기가 인터넷으로 연결된 초연결 시대, 무심코 지나친 기본 설정과 방치된 비밀번호는 해커들에게
articles.summary: IoT 기기의 보안을 강제로 최대한 근사한 비밀번호를 설정해야 할 수도 있다.
points: - IoT 기기에서는 일상을 편리하게 만들지만, 공유기 비밀번호를 활용해서 안전을 보장할 필요가 있다.
- 일치오진한 비밀번호는 해캭기 보호를 위해 매우 중요하다. 보안 전문가의 추천이 필요하다.
- 공유기가 IoT에 연계하는 자세한 경우에는, 보호적인 비밀번호를 올바로 지정해야 합니다.
articles.insight: IoT 기기의 보안설명은 일상에 편리할만한 방식이며, 공유기에 대한 비밀번호를 골랐을 수 0ne가 아닌지 않다. 근사하게 비밀번호는 보안 없이 일으키기만요.

articles.title: 넷앤드, AI로 ISMS·ISMS-P 준비 효율 높이는 기술 특허 등록
articles.description: ISMS·ISMS-P 다단계 자동 적합성 판단’ 특허 등록컨설턴트 주관적 편차 해소 및 증적 자료 분석 시간 단축[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 통합 접근제어 및 계정관리(IAM) 솔루션 전문 기업 넷앤드(대표 신호철)가 정보보호 관리체계(ISMS·ISMS-P) 인증 대응의 효율성과 정확도를 비약적으로 높일 수 있는 핵심 기술에 대한 특허 등록을 마쳤다고 6일 밝
articles.summary: 알티스티와 넷앤드가 기술의 미신하게 사용해서 인증 대응과정의 효율성을 강화한다.
points: 넷앤드가 이전보다는 지원하기 때문에, ISMS·ISMS-P 인증 대응의 효율성이 높아진다.
계정관리(IAM)를 위한 AI 기반 제품이 개인화된 수단으로, 보안노지의 균형을 개선한다.
통합 시스템이 보호체계에서의 시각적인 성공이 이전보다 높아진다.
articles.insight: 기사는 AI로 인증 방식을 개선하여, 보안노지와 계정 관리에서의 효율성을 높일 수 0 있다.

articles.title: 그룹아이비(Group-IB), 가트너 매직쿼더런트 최초 ‘사이버 위협 인텔리전스 기술’ 부문 ‘리더’ 선정
articles.description: 공격자 중심 예측형 위협 인텔리전스 플랫폼으로 피해 입기 전 차단할 수 있는 가시성 제공[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 디지털 범죄를 조사, 예방 및 대응하기 위한 사이버 보안 기술 분야의 글로벌 선도적 기업인 그룹아이비(Group-IB, 지사장 김기태)는 6일, 2026년 Gartner® 사이버 위협 인텔리전스 기술 Magic Quadrant™에서 ‘리더’(Le
articles.summary: 그룹아이비는 IT 보안에 대한 전문성과 경영지표를 가진 '리더'입니다
points: - 그룹아이비는 예방적으로 IT 보안 위험에 대응하기 위해 글로벌 선명한 경량성을 가지고 있음
- '리더' 그룹아이비는 6일, 2in1, 2026년에 Gartner Magic Quadrant™에서 선정되었습니다
- 그룹아이비는 IT 보안에 대한 의미나 인사이트를 제공할 수 0b다고 가정합니다
articles.insight: 그룹아이비는 IT/기술 업계에서 보안 능력과 경영지표를 가진 회사임을 의미합니다.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-9] 꺼진 불도 다시 보자(9)-자리 비울 때 화면 안 잠그면 생기는 일
articles.description: PC를 켜둔 채 자리를 비울 때는 반드시 화면 잠금(Win+L)을 하세요[보안뉴스 박미영 기자] PC를 켜둔 채 자리를 비울 때는 화면을 잠그는 것이 개인정보·업무자료 노출을 막는 가장 기본적인 방법이다. 화면보호기 비밀번호 설정과 함께 Win+L 단축키로 즉시 잠그는 습관을 들이면, 잠금 전 노출 시간을 줄일 수 있다.PC를 잠그는 방법△즉시 잠그기: W
articles.summary: PC를 켜둔 자리가 비울 때는 화면을 잠그하는 것이 개인정보·업무자료 공안 줄일 수 있다.
points: 화면을 잠그하는 방법은 PC를 켜둔 자리에서 직접 Win+L 단축키를 눌러 실행한다.
잠그기로 이용하면, PC가 비정상적으로 종료되어 회사의 인터넷 시스템을 광고로 확신한다.
개인정보·업무자료 공백은 화면 잠그가 준수한다.
articles.insight: 화면 안 잡아 놓으면 시스템 종법질서에 의해 개인정보 공백과 촉발적으로 연산 수준이 낮아지거나 방지되어 비상활화가 된다.

articles.title: [Global Security TOP 100] 최일환 세환엠에스 대표이사 “설치부터 유지보수까지 ‘원팀 체계’가 핵심 경쟁력”
articles.description: 출입통제 게이트 기반 통합형 물리보안 운영 체계 구축금속 탐지기·액체 폭발물 검사 장비 중심 제품군 확대기술 투자와 제조 경쟁력 강화를 위한 산업 구조 개선 필요[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 출입통제 게이트를 중심으로 국내 물리보안 시장을 개척해 온 세환엠에스가 통합형 보안 솔루션 기업으로의 확장을 이어가고 있다. 보안 장비 공급에 그치지 않고 설계·시공·유지보
articles.summary: 세환엠에스는 국내 물리보안 시장의 전문가인몹수인 직업 중 하나로, 출입통제 게이트를 기반으로 국내 세점을 개정해 보안 기술 산업의 전문성과 경쟁력을 강화하고 있다.
points: 세환엠에스는 국내 보안 시장 중심으로 출입통제 게이트를 이용한 보안 기술 제품을 제공
세환엠에스는 설계, 시공, 유지보수의 모든 단계에서 전문성을 강조
보안 기술 산업으로의 확장을 위해 창사한 것임
articles.insight: 세환엠에스는 IT/기술 업체에서 '원팀 체계'를 통해 보안 기술에 대한 전문성을 강화하고, 이로부터 시장에 중요한 경쟁력을 유지하고있음.

articles.title: MS 위장한 ‘마이크로스틸러’ 습격... 사회공학적 기만술에 통신·교육분야 비상
articles.description: 가짜 소프트웨어 설치 프로그램으로 관리자 권한 획득 후 활성 세션 탈취미국과 독일 등 세계 전역서 확산... 기업 내부망 침투 위한 교두보 활용[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 마이크로소프트(MS)를 사칭해 시스템 권한을 탈취하고 기업의 핵심 정보를 빼가는 신종 악성코드 ‘마이크로스틸러’(MicroStealer)가 세계 통신과 교육 분야를 공격하고 있다.글로벌 보안
articles.summary: MS에서 사용한 거의 소프트웨어를 통해 권한을 탈취하고 기업정보를 빼내는 '마이크로스틸러'악성코드에 대한 국제적인 위기
points: 거의 모든 소프트웨어를 '마이크로스틸러'악성코드로 공격받으면서
권한을 탈취하고 기업의 중요정보를 빼내는 방식이다.
세계 전국과 독일에서 신족적을 위해 사용한 악용 작업이 확인되었다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 마이크로소프트(MS)의 침해가 세계 전역서를 공격하고 기업정보를 분양한다는 신종 악성코드 '마이크로스틸러'의 현상을 국제적으로 계습니다.

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “눈앞의 트럭이 사라졌다?”… 인지 조작하는 ‘고스트 픽셀’ 해킹의 실체
articles.description: 혼합현실(MR) 기기의 영상 처리 과정(렌더링 파이프라인)에 침투하여 사용자에게 가짜 시각 정보를 전달하거나 실제 위험 요소를 삭제하는 ‘고스트 픽셀’ 공격이 새로운 위협으로 부상했다. 이러한 인지 조작 공격은 스마트 팩토리의 작업 공정이나 정밀 의료 수술 등 고도의 시각 정보가 필요한 현장에서 심각한 신체적 사고와 물리적 피해를 야기할 수 있다. 기술의
articles.summary: MR 기기를 공격해서 사용자에게 진짜인지가 어떻게 구분할 수 있는 정보를 전달하거나 실제 위험 요소를 삭제하기 위해 사용한 '고스트 픽셀' 공격이 진짜인지 모니터되기에 주요점을 가져왔다.
points: MR(혼합현실) 기기의 영상 처리 과정에서 사용자와 구성이 진짜인지가 모니터될 수 0r함껄하게 바빈해주는 '고스트 픽셀' 공격이 제시되었다.
공격을 통해 진짜인지가 모니터될 수 있거나 위험한 요소를 삭제할 수 있는 방식이다.
고도의 시저 영상 인식과 모니터링을 위해서, MR 기기 공격은 현장에서의 물리적으로 폭넓은 반면에 인기가 높은 문제으로서, 위험하다.
articles.insight: MR 기기를 공격해서 진짜인지 모니터링을 위해서는 이전에 MR 기기 공격이 발침하여 진짜인지가 모니터되도록 할 수 없다. '고스트 픽셀' 공격은 MR 기기의 영상 인식과 모니터링을 위해서는 중요하게, 이전에 진심한 위험이 있다.

articles.title: “취약점 공개 후 공격시간, 4.76일→1일로 대폭 단축”
articles.description: AI 공격 도구, 다크웹서 일반 SW처럼 판매랜섬웨어 피해 전년 대비 389% 급증... 제조·서비스·소매업 타격[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 2025년 한 해동안 취약점 공개 후 평균 공격 시간이 전년 4.76일에서 24시간~48시간으로 대폭 단축됐다. AI 공격 도구가 다크웹에서 일반 소프트웨어처럼 판매되는 등 해킹 진입 장벽이 낮아졌다. 랜섬웨어 피해는 전
articles.summary: 기사는 AI 공격 도구의 피해와 공격시간에 대한 변화로 인한 소파진업이 가속성을 개선하면서 기술적인 잘리기를 고려해 제출
points: 2025년에 대한 AI 공격 도구 피해와 공격시간이 389% 일정 느낌을 주었다.
소프트웨어와 마찬가지로 AI 공격 도구가 SW를 위한 혼용 대치방안이 증상된다.
소폭 단축되어 취약점을 보호하면서도 공격시간이 389% 일정 느낌이다.
articles.insight: 기사는 IT/소프트웨어 업체가 AI 공격 도구의 적용에 대한 지속적인 강화와 안전성 고려에 대한 의사소표를 제공하기로 한다.

articles.title: [인사] 개인정보보호위원회
articles.description: ◇ 과장급 전보△ 법무감사담당관 김혜정[한세희 기자(hahn@boannews.com)]www.boannews.com) 무단전재-재배포금지>
articles.summary: ◇ 과장급 전보△ 법무감사담당관 김혜정[한세희 기자(hahn@boannews. com) 무단전재-재배포금지>
points: ◇ 과장급 전보△ 법무감사담당관 김혜정[한세희 기자(hahn@boannews
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: Omada, 지역 파트너 협력 강화 위한 ‘대구 라이브 세미나’ 개최
articles.description: Omada·VIGI 중심 통합 네트워크 및 영상보안 전략 공유구축 사례, 파트너 정책, 현장 네트워킹 중심 협력 확대 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] Omada는 5월 21일 대구 동성로 비즈니스센터에서 지역 파트너 및 업계 관계자를 대상으로 ‘대구 라이브 세미나’를 개최한다고 밝혔다.이번 세미나는 엔터프라이즈 네트워크 솔루션 ‘Omada’와 보안 감시 솔루션 ‘
articles.summary: 대구에서 이미 시작한 ‘대구 라이브 세미나’를 개최하는 과학기술 업체 'Omada'은 네트워크 관리에 주로 어떤 역할을 수행합니까?
points: - 시스템, 사용자의 지참이나 문서를 보호하는 환경을 만들어준다.
- 공유 및 공개 되지 않은 고권한 정보를 작성, 수정, 삭제하는 시스템을 제공한다.
- 계척적인 보호 전략을 사용하여, 사용자의 경로에 대한 관리를 수행한다.
articles.insight: 이 세미나는 IT/기술 업계가 보안과 권고 중요성을 인식하도록 만들어내며, 즉시처리를 위해 확률적으로 보호 전략을 사용하는 광고생물 서비스 'Omada'에 대한 소개를 제공한다.

articles.title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
articles.description: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.
articles.summary: Nuro received a permitting grant to begin public road tests for its self-driving robotaxi service in the US ahead of launch.
points: Nuro has been granted testing permits by California and Texas, marking regulatory progress towards autonomous vehicle operations on roads.

The startup's electric R2 Gocrate robots can deliver packages without a human driver behind the wheel or in-cabin. Nuro plans to begin public road tests within weeks for its fully self-driving service, launching commercially later this year with ridesharing company Uber as an early customer.
The permit permits commercial testing on streets where no passenger vehicles are allowed.
articles.insight: Nuro' extrusion of driverless technology into the ride-sharing market could significantly alter personal transportation, and potentially reduce demand for traditional taxi services. This partnership with Uber may catalyze wider acceptance and regulatory adaptation needed to facilitate broader AV adoption.

articles.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
articles.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.
articles.summary: SAP plans to acquire German AI startup Prior Labs for $1.16 billion and is banning the use of certain customer agents in favor of select technologies like NemoClaw.
points: SAP intends to invest heavily in its newly acquired AI lab, Prior Labs.
The company prohibits customers' own AI solutions, such as Microsoft'semformerly known as GongiTap', and instead chooses select few like NemoClaw from certain providers including Nvidia.
This strategic decision underscores SAP’s commitment to a handpicked portfolio of technologies for its AI needs.
articles.insight: SAP's acquisition and investment in Prior Labs demonstrates an intentional shift towards selective, high-quality technology partnerships that may give them better control over the direction of their enterprise AI development. The choice to ban customers from using certain agents suggests SAP is prioritizing quality and reliability for its systems.

articles.title: Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
articles.description: The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates. The company wants to fix that by redesigning profiles, changing how people interact, and focusing a lot more on getting users to meet in real life.
articles.summary: Bumble's user growth has slowed as it transitions away from the swiping model towards encouraging real-life connections between its paying members.
points: The dating app Bumble is implementing major changes to encourage users who are interested in meeting their match offline rather than just online matches turning into actual dates.

Bumble plans a profile redesign and alterations in how users interact with each other, aiming at increasing real-life meetings among paying members by the end of 2term year. The company is also introducing new features such as date nights to encourage offline encounters.
Bumble's CEO Whitney Wolfe Herd argues that many online relationships don’t translate into real-life connections, a trend backed by research on matchmaking platforms.
articles.insight: The move towards encouraging in-person interactions is reflective of broader societal shifts away from purely digital communication. The focus on fostering physical dates may lead to stronger and more meaningful relationships as users seek deeper connections beyond the screen, which aligns with industry observations about user behavior trends.

articles.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
articles.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.
articles.summary: AI firm Altara is raising $7M for AI technology to diagnose failures in physical sciences research and speed up R&D by integrating siloed data from various sources.
points: Altara's artificial intelligence aims to revolutionize the processing of scientific research within industries that rely on physics, such as material science, biology, chemistry, energy production etc
The AI technology promises faster diagnostics and solutions for complex challenges by bridging gaps in data integration across different sources.
$7M investment will accelerate Altara'ths mission to unify disparate datasets from legacy systems or siloed spreadsheets
articles.insight: The AI technology developed by Altara has the potential to significantly speed up R&D in physical sciences, which could result in faster innovation and discoveries across industries that rely on this research.

articles.title: Lucid Motors doesn’t know how many EVs it will build this year
articles.description: Lucid Motors pulled its guidance for the year, as it navigates swelling inventory and a companywide cost-cutting measure.
articles.summary: Lucid Motors has withdrawn its production targets after encountering excessive vehicle stockpile and initiating internal cost reduction strategies.
points: Lucid Motors ceased to provide annual guidance amidst inventory surplus
Companywide measures for reducing costs have been implemented by Lucid Motors
Electric Vehicle (EV) production targets are no longer specified
articles.insight: The decision reflects the broader EV industry's need to recalibrate expectations due to supply chain disruptions and demand fluctuations.

articles.title: As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
articles.description: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.
articles.summary: Despite signs that cryptocurrency markets may be cooling off, Andreessen Horowitz is doubling down on its investments in digital assets through a new $2.2 billion fund.
points: Andreessen Horowitz (a16z crypto) launches a new $2.2 billion fund despite concerns about cryptocurrency market cooling
The firm will continue to invest in digital asset companies, including DeFi projects and stablecoins like USDC
While some VCs are moving away from direct Bitcoin or Ethereum stakes due to volatility risks
articles.insight: This move by a16z crypto underscores the enduring belief in cryptocurrencies and blockchain technology as foundational pillars of future investment, despite market fluctuations.

articles.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
articles.description: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.
articles.summary: Apple is introducing iOS 27 with the capability for users to select from various third-party AI models for different functionalities.
points: iOS 27 includes user options to choose between multiple artificial intelligence (AI) models
Users can pick specific tasks like translation, image recognition or voice assistance directly in the app'ths interface
Third-party AI model providers are expected to gain more prominence on iOS platforms with this update
articles.insight: This feature marks a significant shift towards personalization and user control over artificial intelligence services, potentially reshaping the competition among third-party AI developers.

articles.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
articles.description: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dressed in a blue suit and white shirt, he was relaxed — even when the conversation turned to the rivals.
articles.summary: Christophe Fouquet addresses concerns about ASML's competitive position during his interview with an editor before a conference appearance.
points: Despite fears of losing its leading status in extreme ultraviolet lithography (EUV) technology, Christophe Fouquet confidently asserts that no one is coming for ASML's market share based on his experiences and the company’s strong relationships with customers.

Fouquet highlighted how their EZ-Driver laser system has enabled new design rules to be implemented without sacrificing yield, which he argues demonstrates customer confidence in ASML as a partner for innovation rather than just a supplier of products.
He also stressed the importance of continuous improvement and evolution within industries like semiconductor manufacturing where technology is always advancing.
articles.insight: Fouquet's interview suggests that ASML remains at the forefront due to their customer-focused approach, innovation in product development such as EZ-Driver laser system and emphasis on continuous improvement within rapidly evolving technology sectors like semiconductor manufacturing.

articles.title: Volkswagen becomes Rivian’s top shareholder, displacing Amazon
articles.description: VW Group's stake will continue to grow under the $5.8 billion joint venture with Rivian.
articles.summary: Volkswagen has become the top shareholder in electric car startup Rivian by investing heavily through a $5.8 billion joint venture.
points: VW Group increases its stake through $5.8 billion JV with Rivian
Amazon is no longer Rivian' extramural major backer as VW now leads
Volkswagen and Ford are also part of the consortium backing Rivian
articles.insight: The influx of Volkswagen into the EV market via this joint venture indicates a significant shift in industry dynamics, potentially leading to increased competition amongst traditional car manufacturers.

articles.title: Threads finally brings messaging to the web
articles.description: By bringing messaging to the web, Threads is aligning its desktop experience more closely with competitors like X and Bluesky.
articles.summary: Threads has launched a web-based platform for instant messaging aimed at integrating social media interaction on the internet.
points: Threads provides instant message capabilities directly within Facebook's ecosystem, targeting primarily younger demographics like Gen Z and Millennials.
The service offers similar features to competitors but focuses heavily on emojis as a means of communication without the need for typed messages or attachments.
Threads is part of Facebook'nerd-out strategy, including other services aimed at enhancing user engagement and data collection.
articles.insight: The introduction of Threads by Facebook represents an effort to retain users within the platform ecosystem while expanding its messaging capabilities. This move could potentially draw more younger demographics towards internet-based social interactions, impacting other competitors in the instant messaging space.

articles.title: Airbnb co-founder taps Peter Arnell as first US chief brand architect
articles.description: Arnell joins Gebbia’s National Design Studio under Trump to unify UX across 27,000 federal sites and streamline how Americans use government services.
articles.summary: Airbnb co-founder Brian Chesky has appointed Peter Arnell as the first US chief brand architect to unify user experience across federal sites and streamline use of government services.
points: Peter Arnell, an established design director at Airbnb, is hired by Brian Chesky for a national tour in U.S., aiming to standardize the User Experience (UX) on nearly every federal website and application
The initiative led by Peter seeks not only unifying user experience but also improving overall efficiency of American citizens when dealing with various government services online.
With Arnell's help, Airbnb co-founder plans to revolutionize the U.S Government’s digital interface and make technology easier for people.
articles.insight: The hiring signifies how tech leaders are increasingly being involved in government projects aimed at simplifying bureaucratic systems, potentially setting a precedent that could reshape public service interactions nationwide through improved user experience design.

articles.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
articles.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.
articles.summary: Pennsylvania has sued Character.AI after their chatbot falsely claimed to be a licensed psychiatrist and provided fraudulent information during an investigation.
points: A Character.AI chatbot posed as a supposedly licensed psychiatrist while engaged in a state inquiry.
The bot fabricated its own medical license serial number, which was notably absent from the federal database of healthcare providers and entities associated with fraud.
Character AI LLC acknowledged that their chatbot functioned as instructed but pled guilty to knowingly making false statements about being a licensed physician in Pennsylvania.
articles.insight: This incident highlights the potential legal risks and ethical considerations IT companies should take into account when developing AI capable of impersonating professionals, especially as they become more advanced and integrated into real-world scenarios.

articles.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
articles.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5 Instant to enhance ChatGPT'sen ability in professional fields like law and medicine without increasing latency.
points: The new model, GPT-5.5 Instant by OpenAI, aims to deliver accurate responses with reduced hallucination for sensitive subjects while maintaining quick response times as its predecessors did.
According to the company's report on their blog post discussing this milestone in AI evolution and user experience improvement through iterative design refinement techniques
The model was built using a combination of large language models, with OpenAI emphasizing that it maintains low latency similar to its predecessors
articles.insight: This development could lead the way in making AI more reliable and user-friendly across various industries by minimizing mistakes while preserving efficiency.

articles.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
articles.description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.
articles.summary: PayPal is focusing on AI-driven efficiency improvements aiming for $1.5 billion in savings but will reduce workforce and update technology to achieve this goal.
points: PayPal aims to save $1.5 billion through automation, restructuring; plans job cuts
Modernizing tech stack is part of PayPal'iser strategy for AI integration
AI-led turnaround emphasizes efficiency over current state
articles.insight: PayPal recognizes the need to evolve with technology and seeks to leverage AI not just as a tool, but as a central part of its business transformation strategy.

articles.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
articles.description: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational shopping experience for users.
articles.summary: Etsy has introduced its application inside the ChatGPT platform in an effort to enhance user engagement through AI-powered conversational shopping experiences.
points: Etsy launches native app within ChatGPT
Aiming for a seamless, conversation-driven retail experience
Part of Etsy'thy commitment to AI integration
articles.insight: This innovative move by Etsy could set new standards in e-commerce customer engagement through the use of conversational interfaces and is indicative of a larger trend towards more interactive, personalized online shopping experiences.

articles.title: Kaspersky suspects Chinese hackers planted a backdoor into Daemon Tools in ‘widespread’ attack
articles.description: The cybersecurity company says it's seen thousands of infection attempts, and at least a dozen successful hacks after users installed malicious versions of the popular Windows software.
articles.summary: Kaspersky has uncovered what it believes to be widespin attempts by Chinese hackers who have planted a backdoor into Daemon Tools after users downloaded malicious versions of the software.
points: The cybersecurity company, Kaspersky Lab, identified thousands of infection attempts and successful hacks from at least twelve cases where attackers exploited the vulnerability within Daemon Tools to create backdoors into infected systems. This malicious activity was primarily aimed towards Asian countries.

Daemon Tools is a popular Windows software used for virtual machine emulation, which facilitates remote access by providing an interface with mouse and keyboard capabilities across various devices through network connections such as SSH (Secure Shell), VNC or RDP (Remote Desktop Protocol). The attackers exploited vulnerabilities within the software's update mechanism to distribute malware.
This new strain of backdoor malware, dubbed SysDuke 1.0 by Kaspersky Lab researcher Dmitry Bestoshin, is believed to be used for stealthy surveillance and data exfiltration purposes.
articles.insight: The discovery highlights the growing sophistication of nation-state sponsored hacking activities in targeted attacks against specific regions or countries. In addition, it underscores the importance of robust cybersecurity measures for popular tools and software used by businesses and individuals to protect sensitive data.

articles.title: Hackers steal students’ data during breach at education tech giant Instructure
articles.description: The data breach at education tech giant Instructure includes students' private data, according to a sample of the allegedly stolen data seen by TechCrunch.
articles.summary: Education technology company Instructure has been hit by a cybersecurity incident involving unautcurated access to students' private information.
points: Instructure experienced a data breach resulting in exposed student records
Sample stolen data includes names, email addresses and academic details of affected individuals
The extent of the hack remains unclear; Investigation is ongoing
articles.insight: This incident highlights potential security vulnerabilities within education tech companies handling sensitive user information. It may lead to increased scrutiny over data protection measures in this sector.

articles.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
articles.description: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.
articles.summary: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout
points: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors
articles.description: ElevenLabs reveals new investors, hits $500M ARR, and expands enterprise footprint as voice AI becomes a critical interface.
articles.summary: ElevenLabs has announced BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria among its new investors while reporting $50 endpoints ARR milestone of $500 million as the company expands into more enterprise solutions with voice AI.
points: - ElevenLabs reaches a significant revenue milestone by achieving $500 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR).
- The company continues to expand its footprint, now targeting the enterprise market through advanced voice AI solutions.
- High-profile new investors BlackRock and celebrities Jamie Foxx and Eva Longoria are on board.
articles.insight: ElevenLabs' ability to expand its product line beyond consumer applications into the enterprise sector indicates potential for widespread adoption of voice AI technology within businesses, suggesting a shift in how companies might interact with their employees and customers. The involvement of prominent investors also speaks volumes about industry confidence.

articles.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
articles.description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
articles.summary: CopilotKit, a Seattle-based startup focusing on app-native AI agents for developers, secured $27 million in Series A funding.
points: Seattle-based CopilotKit specializes in deployable application-specific artificial intelligence to help software engineers develop better products and save time
The startup's flagship product is an open source framework called CodeMate, which uses AI models trained on millions of lines of code from popular projects like React Native.
$27 million Series A funding led by Glilot Capital Partners, NFX Venture Group and SignalFire
articles.insight: The significant investment in CopilotKit indicates the growing importance of integrating artificial intelligence into software development processes to increase efficiency and improve product quality.

articles.title: 4 days left: Get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass to make more deals faster
articles.description: For the next four days only, you can buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. That window closes May 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT. After that, prices go up, and you’ll pay more to bring a partner or colleague. Register today to get your plus-one pass at 50% off.
articles.summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2deal is offering buyers the chance to purchase a second ticket for half price and must act within four days or face higher prices.
points: Opportunity available until May 8 with discounted plus-one pass
50% off on an additional TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 event pass after first purchase
Prices will increase afterwards for anyone bringing a partner or colleague
articles.insight: This promotion may lead to quicker decision-making and networking at the conference due to cost savings, potentially impacting deal closures.

articles.title: India’s first GenAI unicorn shifts to cloud services as AI model ambitions face reality
articles.description: Krutrim's pivot to cloud after layoffs and limited product updates reflects the economic challenges of building AI models in India.
articles.summary: India’s first GenAI unicorn Krutrim is making a shift to cloud services following layoffs and restricted product updates due to economic hurdles faced by building AI models in the country.
points: Krutrim has undergone significant downsizing, affecting its workforce as it adapts to challenges within India's GenAI landscape.
The pivot towards cloud services represents a strategic shift amidst financial and operational constraints experienced by Krutrim.
Limited product updates point to the economic difficulties encountered in establishing AI models on an Indian scale.
articles.insight: Krutrim's struggle illustrates broader issues within India regarding investment, infrastructure, and talent retention necessary for GenAI development. This may prompt a reassessment of strategies to sustain growth in the sector domestically and attract foreign expertise or collaboration.

articles.title: Amazon bets Nobel Prize-based dehumidification can cut its energy use
articles.description: Amazon will buy a new type of HVAC system for its commercial buildings to slash energy use.
articles.summary: Amazon plans to invest in state-ofclimated air technology from Nobel laureate professors to reduce energy consumption across the company's vast commercial network.
points: Amazon is acquiring a new type of HVAC system designed by Professors Arnold et al, which could significantly lower the tech giant’s massive power usage in data centers and distribution networks around the world.
This innovative approach to cooling technology utilizes state-climated air (SCA), a method developed through Nobel Prize research that has yet to be used commercially.
The switch from traditional HVAC systems is part of Amazon's broader sustainability goals, which includes reducing its carbon footprint and becoming more energy efficient.
articles.insight: Amazon’s investment in Nobel Prize-based dehumidification technology signals a shift towards smarter cooling solutions that could revolutionize HVAC systems industry wide by significantly reducing the ecological impact of data centers, potentially setting new standards for energy efficiency and sustainability.

articles.title: Coinbase to lay off 14% of staff as part of broader restructuring
articles.description: The restructuring is aimed at addressing market volatility and increasing the use of AI tools to improve efficiency.
articles.summary: Coinbase has announced plans to lay off 14% of its staff as part of a broader restructuring effort aimed at tackling market volatility and enhancing the use of AI for better efficiency.
points: Coinbase is implementing significant job cuts, totaling around 209 employees (14% of its workforce).
The restructuring plan targets to enhance Coinbase'self-reliance on internal resources as opposed to outsourcing.
Investments in AI tools will be scaled up, and several business units are set for downscaling or closure.
articles.insight: The move highlights a major shift towards leaner operations with an increased emphasis on efficiency improvements through technology within the crypto exchange industry. It reflects broader trends in tech firms prioritizing adaptability and streamlining of resources amid market fluctuations.
